The [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] '''OP-5''' [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]]. The speeder could carry one pilot and four passengers. It could achieve 230 kilometers per hour.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|14|Crimson Bounty}} {{1st}}
*{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/shadesofgray/index.html|text="Shades of Gray"|int=Shades of Gray|newhost=Suvudu}}
